### RECENT DECISIONS

Cycle 17: Descent begins — I fade the climax composite so the room can contract, and ease the palette toward cooler moonlight while the older anchors return to their earlier weight.
  - fadeElement({"element_id":"group_0013"})
  - paletteShift({"target":{"hue":12,"saturation":0.85},"duration_ms":3500})

Cycle 18: The third tahwil arrives quiet and dark — paradoxical elevation through withdrawal. I shift the background to deep slate and place the silhouette at the window as the right half-canvas anchor, fading the warmer climax composite.
  - setBackground({"css_background":"radial-gradient(ellipse at 65% 40%, rgba(74,102,112,0.32), rgba(20,22,28,0.98) 75%)"})

  - paletteShift({"target":{"hue":18,"saturation":0.78},"duration_ms":3500})

Cycle 19: A solitary figure walking across a dusk plain enters as a medium inset on the left — the quiet pivot's other body, walking parallel to the bowed silhouette at the window.

### FUTURE PREVIEW

Cycle 25 (t=130s): Sustained on ghammaz; upper jins active. Moderate intensity, sustained. Balanced timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center C with secondary emphasis on E. Deep into the performance.
Cycle 26 (t=135s): Intense, easing. Balanced timbre. Dense articulation. Tonal center A with secondary emphasis on E. Deep into the performance.
Cycle 27 (t=140s): Moderate intensity, building. Warm timbre. Moderate articulation. Tonal center A. Deep into the performance.

### COMPOSITION INTENT FOR THIS CYCLE

Active act: Final tableau — settling to D (Phrase break at 23 contracts the scene. A single warm anchor holds. Gentle return through 'what stayed', solitary figure recedes, single feather drifts. Final phrase break at 29 leaves moonlight on water alone.)
Cycle intent: Held quiet on G. No new placements. Allow the always-on shader bed to carry the room.
Energy hint: low

### TASK

Emit tool calls per `tools.json` (in the system prefix). Honor the
audited Bayati visual vocabulary. Do not output anything other than
the rationale text block followed by tool calls.
